The '''Tapani Royal Spaceport''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] located in the [[Commercial District (Procopia)|Commercial District]] of [[Estalle Island]] on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Although the spaceport was compact it had some extremely advanced facilities and was quite exclusive. Only the upper echelons of government, a member of the [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble houses]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] or another favored group were granted permission to land at the Tapani Royal Spaceport. Those that lacked the clearance to land were diverted to the major commercial spaceport on [[Destato Island]]. It was a thriving, busy spaceport that operated for 27 hours a day.
